sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106250" key="u(gro/muron" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρό-μῠρον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑγρὸν μύρον,</foreign> <sense id="n106250.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">liquid ointment,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:119" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.119</biblScope> </bibl> (= <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">129</biblScope> </bibl> Z.); but <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hydromyri</tr_> in Lat. version (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">114</biblScope> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
